sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (id UInt32, value Decimal(38, 2));
INSERT INTO test_decimal (id, value) VALUES (1, toDecimal128(123.45, 2));
UPDATE test_decimal SET value = toDecimal128('12.34', 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, toTypeName(value) AS type_value FROM test_decimal;
SELECT id, value, toDecimal128(value * 1.1, 2) AS new_value FROM test_decimal WHERE value > toDecimal128(100, 0);
